instructions_for_claude:
For each task in `tasks`:
  1. Read the PNG at `png` (relative to this output directory).
  2. If action == 'convert_to_markdown': produce high-fidelity Markdown
     preserving headings, text, ALL tables (use | syntax), and
     describing figures in [Figure: ...] brackets. Write to `output_md`.
  3. If action == 'append_image_description': read any existing
     markdown at `output_md`, append '\n\n[Image Description: <detailed technical description of every diagram/figure on the page>]', write back.
When every task has its `output_md` populated, run:
  python -m doc_to_markdown.main <pdf> --resume --mode cli
